subcodes.first_line: The appointed time hath come, and God hath appeared with manifest sovereignty. O concourse of earth! Fear ye God, for He hath appeared and made manifest that which He desired [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی المیقات و اتی الله بسلطان مبین یا ملاء الارض اتقوا الله انه ظهر و اظهر ما اراد
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
